title: T-020 — Site switcher UX (SiteCrumb global header + cookie/localStorage persistence) — MS-004
prompt:
# T-020 — Site switcher UX (SiteCrumb)

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10.1 MS-004 (Site Switcher UX), §11.4 V-MS-17
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype primitive: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/_shared/primitives.jsx (SiteCrumb usage in shell.jsx)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §Shared Primitives

## Goal
Global SiteCrumb component in the app header showing current site + dropdown of accessible sites. Auto-select for single-site users (V-MS-17); explicit selection required for multi-site users. Persist selection via httpOnly cookie `ms_site_id` (used by middleware T-007 fallback) + localStorage (UX).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/components/site-switcher.tsx — shadcn DropdownMenu rendering:
   - Current site label + chevron (clickable for multi-site).
   - List of accessible sites from getServerSession.accessibleSites.
   - Primary site marked with star icon.
   - 'All Sites' option (super_admin only).
2. Server Action setSiteContext(siteId | null) writes httpOnly cookie `ms_site_id` + emits audit event 'site_switched'. Client triggers router.refresh() after action settles.
3. Single-site users see static text (no dropdown) per V-MS-17.
4. Tests: V-MS-17 single-site renders static; multi-site renders dropdown; switch action sets cookie + audit event; super_admin sees All Sites option.

## Files
- apps/web/components/site-switcher.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/_actions/set-site-context.ts [create]
- apps/web/components/__tests__/site-switcher.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/layout.tsx [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given user has 1 active site_user_access row, when SiteSwitcher renders, then static label is shown (no dropdown) per V-MS-17.
2. Given user has 3 sites accessible, when SiteSwitcher renders, then a DropdownMenu with 3 items appears + primary site marked with star icon.
3. Given user clicks site Y in dropdown, when setSiteContext(Y) settles, then cookie 'ms_site_id'=Y is httpOnly + secure + sameSite=lax + Path=/; localStorage.ms_site_id=Y; audit_events row 'site_switched' written; router.refresh() invoked.
4. Given super_admin user, when SiteSwitcher renders, then 'All Sites' option appears at the bottom of the dropdown; selecting it calls setSiteContext(null).
5. Given the cookie ms_site_id is present and matches an accessible site, when page is reloaded, then SiteSwitcher pre-selects that site (no flash to default).
6. Given accessibility audit runs (axe), when SiteSwitcher is in the DOM, then zero axe violations.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test all 6 ACs (single-site static, multi-site dropdown, switch action sets cookie+audit, super_admin All Sites, cookie persistence, a11y) before component exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run site-switcher' + Playwright site-switcher.spec.ts.

## Risk red lines
- Do not store ms_site_id in a non-httpOnly cookie — middleware T-007 needs it server-side.
- Do not let localStorage drift from cookie — single source of truth is the cookie (validation in T-007 middleware).
- Do not hide dropdown via CSS — V-MS-17 renders static text only for single-site users (no JS-blink).
- Do not allow site switch without writing audit_events row.
- Do not allow super_admin All Sites to bypass V-MS-07 audit — every cross-site read still logged downstream.

## Prototype parity
Spec-driven UI; canonical source = `docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10.4 / §10B MS-110` plus the nearest reusable design-system pattern from `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/_shared/`. The prototype path referenced in the implementation contract is illustrative; the binding contract is the PRD acceptance criteria + the shared dropdown/header primitives.

pipeline_inputs.description: Global header SiteCrumb component (primitive in _shared) — dropdown if multiple sites, static label if 1 site (V-MS-17 auto-select), httpOnly cookie ms_site_id + localStorage persistence + Server Component refresh on switch.

acceptance_criteria: Given user has 1 active site_user_access row, when SiteSwitcher renders, then static label shown (no dropdown) per V-MS-17; AND given user has 3 sites accessible when SiteSwitcher renders then DropdownMenu with 3 items + primary marked.

Given user clicks site Y, when setSiteContext(Y) settles, then cookie ms_site_id=Y httpOnly+secure+sameSite=lax+Path=/; localStorage updated; audit_events 'site_switched' written; router.refresh() invoked; AND given cookie ms_site_id present and matches accessible site when page reloads then SiteSwitcher pre-selects that site.
Given super_admin user, when SiteSwitcher renders, then 'All Sites' option at bottom; selecting calls setSiteContext(null).
Given axe runs, when SiteSwitcher is in DOM, then zero violations.
test_strategy: RED: RTL all 6 ACs before component exists.
Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run site-switcher' + Playwright site-switcher.spec.ts.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

Do not let localStorage drift — cookie is source of truth.
Do not hide dropdown via CSS — V-MS-17 renders static text only for single-site.
Do not allow site switch without audit_events row.
Do not let super_admin All Sites bypass V-MS-07 downstream audit.
